fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. ticket-viewer adds workflow-specific surfaces for actionable next, blockers, and unblocked-by flows while keeping existing generic list sorts for plain browsing. 2. Workflow panels preserve server-authored order and direct parent-child structure instead of locally resorting or flattening the payload. 3. The UI surfaces recent-unblock and frontier-leaf evidence clearly enough to explain why items rank where they do. 4. Focused browser and Playwright coverage validate workflow ordering and tree rendering in the release viewer.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer] Add workflow ordering and blocker-tree surfaces

fields.implementation_summary: Added a workflow-specific sidebar mode in ticket-viewer with dedicated next, blockers, and unblocked-by surfaces backed by the new workflow HTTP endpoints; preserved the existing browse tree and generic sort path; added a seeded release-binary Playwright spec that validates server-authored workflow order and tree hierarchy.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer] Add workflow ordering and blocker-tree surfaces
fields.validation_summary: cargo check --manifest-path memory-viewers/ticket-viewer/Cargo.toml; cargo build --manifest-path memory-viewers/ticket-viewer/Cargo.toml --release && viewer-ctl stop ticket-viewer && viewer-ctl install ticket-viewer; npm run test:e2e:release -- workflow-sidebar.spec.ts; npm run test:e2e:release:headed -- workflow-sidebar.spec.ts

fields.implementation_summary: Added a workflow-specific sidebar mode in ticket-viewer with dedicated next, blockers, and unblocked-by surfaces backed by the new workflow HTTP endpoints; preserved the existing browse tree and generic sort path; and extended the seeded release Playwright workflow spec to validate browse preservation, empty-root workflow states, server-authored hierarchy, evidence rendering, and narrow-width layout.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer] Add workflow ordering and blocker-tree surfaces
fields.validation_summary: Initial implementation validation: cargo check --manifest-path memory-viewers/ticket-viewer/Cargo.toml passed; cargo build --manifest-path memory-viewers/ticket-viewer/Cargo.toml --release && viewer-ctl stop ticket-viewer && viewer-ctl install ticket-viewer passed; npm run test:e2e:release:headed -- workflow-sidebar.spec.ts passed. Follow-up validation on 2026-05-25 after extending the seeded release workflow spec: npm run test:e2e:release -- workflow-sidebar.spec.ts passed.
